reviews.comment:
Todo lo que se espera del ACA. Más en esta zona de la estepa en la Línea Sur Ríonegrina. Servicios acotados por el lugar, pero uno ansía llegar para la parada de descanso en el viaje

(Translated by Google)
Everything you'd expect from the ACA. Even more so in this area of ​​the steppe on the Southern Line of Río Negro. Services are limited by the location, but you long to arrive for a rest stop along the way.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHNnAzOFZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Esta estación de servicio es una especie de oasis en el desierto. Sin embargo, la atención en los surtidores  es innecesariamente lenta y, claramente, no hay ningún esfuerzo por apurarla. Esto hace que en determinados momentos se formen filas kilométricas para cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
This gas station is a bit of an oasis in the desert. However, the service at the pumps is unnecessarily slow, and there's clearly no effort to speed things up. This results in kilometer-long lines at certain times.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHckpIa2p3RRAB

reviews.comment:
El hotel limpio y las camas cómodas. Lo que es patético es que el desayuno se sirva en el serviclub de la YPF, que en teoría abría a las 8, tardísimo para un lugar donde la gente sigue viaje o está por trabajo. Si entras a trabajar a las 8, no desayunas, aunque ya te lo cobraron. Pero encima a las 8 con suerte recién está la chica, termina abriendo 8:15, y encima faltaba que caliente la máquina del café, faltaban las medialunas.. Malusimo servicio para un lugar donde la heces se mueve temprano.

(Translated by Google)
The hotel was clean and the beds comfortable. What's pathetic is that breakfast is served at the YPF service station, which is supposed to open at 8:00, incredibly late for a place where people are traveling or there for work. If you start work at 8:00, you don't get breakfast, even though you've already paid for it. And to top it off, the waitress is barely there until 8:00, finally opening at 8:15, and then the coffee machine wasn't even warm, and they were missing croissants... Terrible service for a place where people usually start their day early.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2Ny15SmtnRRAB
